nodes.name: Merge Analytics
nodes.code_preview: const business = $('Calculate Business Metrics').first().json; const finance = $('Calculate Finance Metrics').first().json; const sales = $('Prepare Sales Summary').first().json; return [{ json: { period: sales.period || 'last_7_days', periodLabel: 'Продажи за последние 7 дней', periodDays: 7, ...business, finance } }];

nodes.name: Prepare Top10 Data
nodes.code_preview: const data = $('Calculate Business Metrics').first().json; return (data.top10Products || []).map((p, index) => ({ json: { date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), periodFrom: data.periodFrom, periodTo: data.periodTo, rank: index + 1, supplierArticle: p.supplierArticle || '', subject: p.subject || '', brand: p.brand || '', nmId: p.nmId || '', orders: p.orders || 0, revenue: Math.round(p.revenue || 0), avgPrice: p.avgPrice || 0, stock: p.stock || 0 } }));

nodes.name: Prepare Competitor Search
